Home / Services / n8n Workflows
Dedicated service

n8n Workflow Integration

n8n can remove a lot of manual operations work, but only if workflows are built like production systems. I design n8n architectures that connect forms, CRM, email tools, internal APIs, AI services, and reporting without creating hidden failure points. Most clients call me when lead routing breaks, alerts are noisy, or ownership is unclear across tools. I set naming standards, add retries and fallback paths, and make failures visible before they hurt pipeline performance. Based in Marseille and working internationally, I help teams turn ad-hoc automations into a stable operations layer they can trust every day.

Discuss your project Request the free n8n audit

What is included

  • n8n workflow architecture and naming standards
  • Core automations for lead, CRM, and operations flows
  • Webhook/API integrations and data transformations
  • Error handling, retries, and monitoring alerts
  • Handover guide for internal ownership

Best fit when

  • Your team repeats manual ops tasks every day
  • Your tool stack is connected inconsistently
  • You need reliable automation without heavy lock-in

Typical sprint flow

  1. 01 Workflow mapping and source-of-truth definition
  2. 02 Node implementation and data validation
  3. 03 Resilience setup (alerts, retries, logs)
  4. 04 Team documentation and rollout

Proof and context

  • Production-oriented workflow design
  • Clean standards for team maintainability
  • Integration across CRM, forms, API, and AI services
  • Monitoring-first mindset to reduce downtime

Free n8n workflow audit

I review your current workflows and identify where reliability, speed, and maintainability can improve quickly.

You get in 5 business days

  • Map of fragile nodes and failure points
  • Priority fixes for stability and visibility
  • Migration path toward cleaner workflow architecture
Request the free n8n audit Discuss your needs

n8n integration FAQ

Can you improve existing n8n workflows?

Yes. I audit current workflows, isolate fragile nodes, and refactor for clarity, resilience, and easier team ownership.

Do you handle alerts and failure recovery?

Yes. I set up retries, fallback branches, and alerting so failures are detected quickly and recovery is straightforward.

Can n8n connect with our CRM and internal APIs?

Yes. I regularly connect n8n with CRMs, internal APIs, forms, email tools, and data sources, with validation and mapping rules.

Need n8n workflows your team can trust every day?

Share your current setup and failure points, and I will propose a practical hardening plan with clear priorities.
